title: T.I.M.E. is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: T.I.M.E. is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Join the T.I.M.E. family as a Subject Matter Expert in Noida. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About T.I.M.E.:
T.I.M.E. is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with T.I.M.E.!
